name: @clearline/domain-onboarding
description: Pure, framework-agnostic business-onboarding (KYB) rules — EIN format, beneficial-owner KYC threshold, onboarding inactivity, document retry cap, and client-side document image quality checks. No data-access or UI dependencies, mirrors libs/domain/auth.

metadata.scope: Domain lib for EPIC-CW-002 (US-CW-004 Business Onboarding Flow, US-CW-005 Identity Document Verification & Compliance Screening).
